name: Tuna Pitas with Yogurt & Mustard
recipeIngredient: 1 can 6 1/2 oz Solid White Tuna, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Line the bread halves with lettuce leaves and tomatoes.
3. Divide the tuna mixture among the bread pockets.
4. Serve immediately.
